subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the Fragrances of God! Verily, I chanted thy poem. Its significance was beautiful, its composition eloquent
subcodes.subjects: @literature; drama; humanities; the arts, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @music and singing, @praise and encouragement
